title: lolium perenne subsp. multiflorum
intro: Lolium perenne subsp. multiflorum, commonly known as ryegrass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lolium perenne subsp. multiflorum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of ryegrass can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
